← Back to all demos

G1 Native LeRobot

Native integration via LeRobot's official make_env() factory. This demo family exercises the same environment API with two different locomotion controllers and publishes a dedicated report for each controller.

GR00T Balance + Walk

Humanoid API CPU GR00T RL

Stand → walk → stop on the native LeRobot G1 MuJoCo environment using GR00T ONNX locomotion policies through VectorEnvAdapter.

Task: lerobot_g1_native_groot · report with checkpoint captures

SONIC Planner

Humanoid API CPU SONIC Planner

The same native LeRobot environment driven by the SONIC kinematic planner, producing a separate report for direct controller-level comparison.

Task: lerobot_g1_native_sonic · report with checkpoint captures

Run Locally

MUJOCO_GL=osmesa python examples/lerobot_g1_native.py --controller groot --report

MUJOCO_GL=osmesa python examples/lerobot_g1_native.py --controller sonic --report

Generated by Roboharness
